title: Minecraft Meme Soundpack
description: MCMSP is a minecraft resourcepack aimed at changing minecraft sound effects for a more enjoyable experience.
body:
MCMSP is a minecraft resourcepack aimed at changing minecraft sound effects for a more enjoyable experience.

- new sound effects for EVERY mob (Yes, ALL the mobs, so go ahead and discover the references)
- sound effects for different other events and blocks
- new music discs sounds and in-game music
